CustomField.description: Shared secret sent as the x-handoff-secret header on POST /dialer/handoffs to services/cti-api. Must match the CTI API's HANDOFF_SHARED_SECRET env var (set in Railway) exactly. Enter this value in Setup → Custom Settings → Power Dial Setting → Manage → New (org-wide default) — never commit it to source control. See lwc/powerDial/README.md.
CustomField.label: Handoff Shared Secret
